# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Build command to execute (e.g., npm run build, make build, gradle build)'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'npm ci && npm run build'
          - 'npm ci && npm run build -- --production'
          - 'make build'
          - 'make build-release'
          - 'gradle build'
          - 'gradle build --no-daemon'
          - 'mvn clean package'
          - 'mvn clean package -DskipTests'
          - 'dotnet build --configuration Release'
          - 'cargo build --release'
          - 'go build ./...'
          - 'python setup.py build'
          - 'pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m build'
      test_command:
        description: 'Test command to execute'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'none'
          - 'npm test'
          - 'npm run test:ci'
          - 'make test'
          - 'gradle test'
          - 'mvn test'
          - 'dotnet test'
          - 'cargo test'
          - 'go test ./...'
          - 'pytest'
          - 'python -m unittest discover'
      lint_command:
        description: 'Lint command to execute'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'none'
          - 'npm run lint'
          - 'make lint'
          - 'gradle lint'
          - 'flake8 .'
          - 'pylint src/'
          - 'golangci-lint run'
          - 'cargo clippy'
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for build commands'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '.'
          - './src'
          - './app'
          - './backend'
          - './frontend'
          - './services'
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'none'
          - '16'
          - '18'
          - '20'
          - '22'
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'none'
          - '11'
          - '17'
          - '21'
      python_version:
        description: 'Python version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'none'
          - '3.9'
          - '3.10'
          - '3.11'
          - '3.12'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    name: Validate Inputs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      build_command: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.build_command }}
      test_command: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.test_command }}
      lint_command: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.lint_command }}
      working_directory: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.working_directory }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate and sanitize inputs
        id: validate
        run: |
          ALLOWED_BUILD_COMMANDS=(
            "npm ci && npm run build"
            "npm ci && npm run build -- --production"
            "make build"
            "make build-release"
            "gradle build"
            "gradle build --no-daemon"
            "mvn clean package"
            "mvn clean package -DskipTests"
            "dotnet build --configuration Release"
            "cargo build --release"
            "go build ./..."
            "python setup.py build"
            "pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m build"
          )

          ALLOWED_TEST_COMMANDS=(
            "none"
            "npm test"
            "npm run test:ci"
            "make test"
            "gradle test"
            "mvn test"
            "dotnet test"
            "cargo test"
            "go test ./..."
            "pytest"
            "python -m unittest discover"
          )

          ALLOWED_LINT_COMMANDS=(
            "none"
            "npm run lint"
            "make lint"
            "gradle lint"
            "flake8 ."
            "pylint src/"
            "golangci-lint run"
            "cargo clippy"
          )

          ALLOWED_WORKING_DIRS=(
            "."
            "./src"
            "./app"
            "./backend"
            "./frontend"
            "./services"
          )

          BUILD_VALID=false
          for cmd in "${ALLOWED_BUILD_COMMANDS[@]}"; do
            if [ "$cmd" = "${{ inputs.build_command }}" ]; then
              BUILD_VALID=true
              break
            fi
          done

          TEST_VALID=false
          for cmd in "${ALLOWED_TEST_COMMANDS[@]}"; do
            if [ "$cmd" = "${{ inputs.test_command }}" ]; then
              TEST_VALID=true
              break
            fi
          done

          LINT_VALID=false
          for cmd in "${ALLOWED_LINT_COMMANDS[@]}"; do
            if [ "$cmd" = "${{ inputs.lint_command }}" ]; then
              LINT_VALID=true
              break
            fi
          done

          DIR_VALID=false
          for dir in "${ALLOWED_WORKING_DIRS[@]}"; do
            if [ "$dir" = "${{ inputs.working_directory }}" ]; then
              DIR_VALID=true
              break
            fi
          done

          if [ "$BUILD_VALID" != "true" ]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid build command specified"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [ "$TEST_VALID" != "true" ]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid test command specified"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [ "$LINT_VALID" != "true" ]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid lint command specified"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [ "$DIR_VALID" != "true" ]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid working directory specified"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "build_command=${{ inputs.build_command }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "test_command=${{ inputs.test_command }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "lint_command=${{ inputs.lint_command }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "working_directory=${{ inputs.working_directory }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          echo "All inputs validated successfully"

  setup-environment:
    name: Setup Build Environment
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      cache_key: ${{ steps.cache-setup.outputs.cache_key }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: inputs.node_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: inputs.java_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: inputs.python_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Generate cache key
        id: cache-setup
        run: |
          echo "cache_key=${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

  lint:
    name: Lint
    needs:
      - validate-inputs
      - setup-environment
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: inputs.lint_command != 'none'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: inputs.node_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: inputs.java_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: inputs.python_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Install dependencies for Node.js projects
        if: inputs.node_version != 'none'
        working-directory: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          if [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
            npm ci
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies for Python projects
        if: inputs.python_version != 'none'
        working-directory: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          if [ -f "requirements-dev.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi

      - name: Run lint
        working-directory: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}
        run: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.lint_command }}

  build:
    name: Build
    needs:
      - validate-inputs
      - setup-environment
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: inputs.node_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: inputs.java_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: inputs.python_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Display build configuration
        run: |
          echo "========================================="
          echo "Build Configuration Summary"
          echo "========================================="
          echo "Build Command: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_command }}"
          echo "Test Command: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.test_command }}"
          echo "Lint Command: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.lint_command }}"
          echo "Working Directory: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}"
          echo "Node Version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}"
          echo "Java Version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}"
          echo "Python Version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}"
          echo "========================================="

      - name: Run build
        working-directory: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}
        run: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_command }}

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: always()
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: |
            ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}/dist/
            ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}/build/
            ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}/target/
            ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}/out/
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 7

  test:
    name: Test
    needs:
      - validate-inputs
      - build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: inputs.test_command != 'none'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: inputs.node_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: inputs.java_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: inputs.python_version != 'none'
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Install dependencies for Node.js projects
        if: inputs.node_version != 'none'
        working-directory: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          if [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
            npm ci
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies for Python projects
        if: inputs.python_version != 'none'
        working-directory: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          if [ -f "requirements-dev.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run tests
        working-directory: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}
        run: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.test_command }}

      - name: Upload test results
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: always()
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: |
            ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}/**/test-results/
            ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}/**/coverage/
            ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}/**/surefire-reports/
            ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}/junit*.xml
            ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}/coverage*.xml
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 7

  summary:
    name: Build Summary
    needs:
      - validate-inputs
      - build
      - test
      - lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Generate build summary
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Step | Status |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|------|--------|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Validation | ${{ needs.validate-inputs.result }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Build | ${{ needs.build.result }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Test | ${{ needs.test.result }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Lint | ${{ needs.lint.result }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "### Configuration" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Build Command:** \`${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_command }}\`" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Test Command:** \`${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.test_command }}\`" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Lint Command:** \`${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.lint_command }}\`" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Working Directory:** \`${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.working_directory }}\`" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Triggered by:** ${{ github.actor }}" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **Run ID:** ${{ github.run_id }}" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

      - name: Check overall status
        if: needs.build.result == 'failure' || needs.validate-inputs.result == 'failure'
        run: |
          echo "::error::Build pipeline failed. Check individual job logs for details."
          exit 1
